query:
SELECT 
  c.title as course,
  COUNT(l.id) as total_aulas,
  SUM(CASE WHEN l.video_url IS NOT NULL AND l.video_url != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_video,
  SUM(CASE WHEN CHAR_LENGTH(l.content) > 2000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as expandidas_2k,
  SUM(CASE WHEN CHAR_LENGTH(l.content) > 3000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as expandidas_3k,
  ROUND(AVG(CHAR_LENGTH(l.content))) as media_caracteres
FROM courses c
LEFT JOIN modules m ON c.id = m.course_id
LEFT JOIN lessons l ON m.id = l.module_id
GROUP BY c.id, c.title
ORDER BY c.created_at ASC;
